title: Submodes Tier Tagger
description: Submodes Tier Tagger adds customizable tier tags to nametags and tablist for Mace Submodes.
body:
****Submodes Tier Tagger is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Mace Submodes that adds customizable tier tags to player nametags and the tablist.****

Features include:

Clean customizable tier tags
Tablist integration
Gamemode icons
Mod Menu configuration support
Adjustable tier positioning
Multiple display modes and cycling support
Client-side rendering with no server installation required

Designed to provide a cleaner and more informative PvP experience for Mace Submodes players while staying lightweight and easy to configure.
